mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID as id, PWD as password, NM as name, EMAIL as email, ADM_YN as admin FROM tb_user WHERE USER_ID = #{id} AND (DEL_YN = false or DEL_YN is null)
SELECT USER_ID as id, NM as name, EMAIL as email, ADM_YN as admin FROM tb_user WHERE USER_ID != 'space' AND (DEL_YN = false or DEL_YN is null) ORDER BY USER_ID
SELECT BLOCK_TIME FROM tb_user WHERE USER_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user ( USER_ID, PWD, NM, EMAIL, ADM_YN, CRET_DT, UPDT_DT, LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{admin}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user SET DEL_YN = true WHERE USER_ID = #{id}
UPDATE tb_user SET LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT = LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT + 1 WHERE USER_ID = #{id}
UPDATE tb_user SET LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT = 0, BLOCK_TIME = NULL WHERE USER_ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT FROM tb_user WHERE USER_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_event_log ( TIME_VAL, HOSTNAME, JOB_ID, JOB_EX_SVC, SEVERITY, MSG, JOB_EX_USER_ID ) VALUES ( now(), #{hostName}, #{jobId}, #{jobExSvc}, #{severity}, #{msg}, #{jobExUserId} )
